stemHtml: ATC asks: "Are you able to maintain a parallel offset route?". The controller wants to know whether you can...

options.a: Fly at a specified lateral distance parallel to your assigned route.
options.b: Overtake a slower aircraft ahead on the same track.
options.c: Switch to a parallel airway alongside your current route.
options.d: Alter heading to avoid opposite-direction traffic on the same track.
